Text.Page: You received a letter from the Mysterium requesting help. Your team entered the Wonderholme and defeated Bandersnatch and his noctenium-corrupted crew to rescue Aliss and the other scientists.

Dear ,

I am Adonis, Maester of the Mysterium. In my haste to begin study on an immense castle built of noctenium, I may have sent my people into grave danger. My foremost noctenium expert, Aliss, and her associates are missing and I am unable to contact them or retrieve them by myself.

If your travels take you near Wonderholme in the Veritas District, would you help mount a rescue mission to retrieve my people?

——Maester Adonis

Don’t be fooled by my appearance. I was once a researcher of the Mysterium, until this cursed place transformed me into what you see now.

But if you didn't come here for me, why are you here?"I got a letter, asking for my help."

Ah, you must be who Adonis spoke of. I have actually been waiting for you.

This place is Wonderholme. It's noctenium walls have created powerful beasts and fiendish traps.

We came to study the noctenium effects but the denizens were too powerful, and I ended up corrupted like them. The owner of the keep proclaimed himself king of the world, and took our chief scientist, Aliss, prisoner. Please free Aliss.

As soon as you ascend the stairs, enemies will rush out to meet you.

Keep your wits about you, and you will endure—and prevail!

Good luck!

Thank you so much.

If you had not come, I could not have rescued Aliss. The sorcerer seized noctenium belonging to the Mysterium. Getting it out of his hands is also important

I hereby reward you for your service.

You've earned the title Defender of Science, which carries tremendous respect in the Mysterium.

Your accomplishment today will be forever remembered!
